data.summary: The requirement for a unique link per meeting is satisfied.
data.assessment: The evidence provided in the linked use case clearly demonstrates that the system automatically creates a unique Zoom meeting room and generates a link for each appointment, which is included in the confirmation email. This functionality directly supports the requirement of having a unique link per meeting for security purposes, as the link is generated at the time of booking and expires after the meeting. The specific scenario outlined in the use case confirms that the functionality is implemented as required.
